title: gladiolus × flabellifer
intro: Gladiolus × flabellifer, also known as the sword lily or flabellate gladiolus, is a hybrid plant species within the genus Gladiolus. It is believed to have originated in South Africa and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including inflammation, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of Gladiolus × flabellifer include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used to promote wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues.
